channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Karmelo Anthony sentenced to 35 years for killing Austin Metcalf
item.description: Karmelo Anthony was convicted earlier Tuesday for the fatal confrontation at a Frisco track meet.

item.title: Violent anti-immigration protests erupt in Belfast after stabbing
item.description: Masked protesters set a bus and homes on fire in Belfast despite calls for calm.

item.title: Mass shooting by multiple attackers kills at least 12 in South Africa
item.description: At least 12 people were killed and nine wounded in a mass shooting near Johannesburg.

item.title: Legal challenges persist against 'Anti-Weaponization Fund' despite DOJ pledge
item.description: Two cases continue to challenge the $1.8 billion fund despite DOJ's vow to abandon it.
